category-def.name: raaml.picto.studio.category
category-def.label: RAAML Picto Studio
category-def.description: Risk Analysis and Assessment Modeling Language (RAAML) with Picto visualizations. Supports FMEA, FTA, HARA, STPA, GSN, REQ and ISO 26262 analysis types. Requires Epsilon 2.8.0 to be pre-installed.
